title: By Kii Fun Ferry with Cars 3Y+
features: The set includes a Fun Ferry and 4 Cars. The colourful and sturdy ferry bath toy that floats effortlessly in water, providing endless fun during bath time.
Featuring a spacious interior that can hold the four included cars, allowing for imaginative play scenarios of transportation and adventure.
Each car in the set is uniquely designed with vibrant colours and charming details, inspiring creativity and storytelling.
Both the Fun Ferry & four cars are crafted from high-quality recycled plastic, non-toxic materials for safety and durability, ensuring long-lasting enjoyment for your child.
The cars and ferry encourages motor skills, hand-eye coordination and cognitive development through interactive play, making it both entertaining and educational.
The fun ferry & floating cars can be used for imaginative play in and out of the bathtub. The cars can be rolled across the floor and into the fun ferry’s slide out ramp.
Suitable for indoor and outdoor use. BPA Free. PVC Free. Phthalates Free. Dishwasher safe. Ferry H17 x L25 x W16 cm. Each car H3 x L9.7 x W5 cm.
Meets the following standards: EN71, EN71-2 & EN71-3
Warning - not suitable for children under 3.
description: Product description By Kii is on a mission to create fun, safe and sustainable baby toys and products! Make bath time a voyage of imagination and excitement with our ferry & cars bath toy set! This delightful set combines the joy of a floating ferry with four adorable cars, providing endless fun and imaginative play opportunities in the tub. The centrepiece of this set is the colourful and sturdy ferry, designed to float effortlessly in water. Its spacious interior accommodates the four included cars, allowing your child to engage in pretend-play scenarios of transportation and adventure. The fun ferry features a slide out ramp, enabling easy access to the cars and encouraging storytelling and interactive play. Each of the four cars in the set is uniquely designed, showcasing vibrant colours and charming details. These cars are perfectly sized for little hands to grasp and manoeuvre, enhancing fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Crafted from high-quality recycled plastic, non-toxic materials, the ferry & cars bath toy set guarantees both safety and durability, ensuring long-lasting enjoyment for your child. This toy set not only provides entertainment during bath time but also encourages learning through imaginative play, fostering cognitive development and storytelling skills. Create a world of water-based adventures with our captivating Ferry & Cars Bath Toy Set – an ideal addition to your child's bath time routine and a wonderful gift for little explorers! Please note that adult supervision is recommended during bath time to ensure water safety. Directions 1. Place the Fun Ferry and Cars in the bathtub, allowing them to float. 2. Place the four cars inside the spacious interior of the Fun Ferry. 3. Use the slide out ramp to drive the cars out of the Fun Ferry. 4. Engage in imaginative play with the Fun Ferry and Cars, both in and out of the bathtub. 5. Ensure adult supervision during bath time for water safety.
